title: Sand
description: Coarse soil with large particles and rapid drainage.
source: Sol grossier à grosses particules et drainage rapide.

title: Loamy sand
description: Very sandy soil with slightly improved water holding.
source: Sol très sableux avec rétention d’eau légèrement meilleure.

title: Sandy loam
description: Sandy soil that holds more water and nutrients than sand.
source: Sol sableux retenant mieux l’eau et les nutriments que le sable.

title: Loam
description: Balanced mix of sand, silt and clay with good tilth.
source: Mélange équilibré sable–limon–argile à bonne structure.

title: Silt loam
description: Smooth soil that holds water well and drains slowly.
source: Sol lisse à bonne rétention d’eau et drainage lent.

title: Silt
description: Fine soil with silky feel and high water holding.
source: Sol fin au toucher soyeux et forte rétention d’eau.

title: Sandy clay loam
description: Coarser fine‑textured mix with moderate water holding.
source: Mélange plus fin à drainage modéré.

title: Clay loam
description: Fine‑textured mix with slower drainage and higher fertility.
source: Texture fine; drainage lent et fertilité élevée.

title: Silty clay loam
description: Fine‑textured soil with slow drainage and strong nutrient holding.
source: Texture fine; drainage lent et bonne rétention.

title: Sandy clay
description: Clayey soil containing sand with slow drainage.
source: Sol argileux avec sable; drainage lent.

title: Silty clay
description: Clayey soil containing silt with slow drainage.
source: Sol argileux avec limon; drainage lent.

title: Clay
description: Very fine soil with slow drainage and high nutrient holding.
source: Sol très fin, drainage lent et forte capacité nutritive.
